mode_selection_rationale: No pending operator directives. PROP-030 backlog metrics all-clear. Mode 1 triggered by two stranded-patches files >24h old without tombstones (2026-05-14T21-28, 2026-05-15T01-29) AND elevated disk pressure (project footprint 1243MB, threshold CRITICAL=1000MB). Mode 3 cost-engineering deferred — prior run (05:27Z) was a deep directive-override investigation; this run is the verification + flag pass.

details: Stranded patches >24h (no tombstone): 2 files (stranded-patches-2026-05-14T21-28-05Z, stranded-patches-2026-05-15T01-29-11Z). PROP-016 Mech A artifacts — need operator manual application.
Three older stranded-patches files (188h) ARE tombstoned (tombstone_status=applied) — skipped per Mode 1 tombstone convention.
Agent freshness: all healthy. poller 7h old (12h cadence), curmudgeon 1h, decider 1h, analyst 0.5h, workspace-sync 0h.
FUSE: 5 sample files (wins.json, sections.json, digest-reviews.js, generate-html.js, docs/index.html) all MATCH GitHub canonical.
DISK: / at 98% used, 205M avail. Project-induced footprint 1243MB (above CRITICAL 1000MB threshold).
/tmp/edit-clone (577M, 1h old) is the operator's ACTIVE working clone — NOT eligible for cleanup per the standing empowerment rules (mtime < 24h AND <2h for the special-cased path).
No actionable cleanup empowered. Disk pressure is operator-attention concern: next decider run needs ~290M to clone, 205M available — risk of degraded-FUSE mode if the operator's clone grows further.

FUSE staleness on prompts: monitor/prompts/decider.md and decider-intake.md are stale relative to main (decider.md last touched 05-16 06:45 in FUSE; main has commit dae6fb2 at 2026-05-17T05:43Z adding Priority 2b/2c blocks; decider-intake.md FUSE=335 lines, main=417 lines). Expected — prompts are git-owned, build.js publish copies git→FUSE but didn't run after the prompt-only commit. Scheduled agents read from fresh clones so the hotfix WILL fire on next decider invocation.

mode_3_cost_engineering.details: Pipeline has known-pending verification work (hotfix landed 16min after prior tinker's recommendation, but next decider run not yet executed). Defer cost-eng to a later run where the verification has either passed or failed cleanly.

mode_4_proposals_self_fixes.details: Prior tinker run's hotfix recommendation has already been applied by the operator (commit dae6fb2 at 2026-05-17T05:43:42Z on main). No new proposals required this cycle.

operator_directive_discovery.note: DIRECTIVE-20260517-001 was marked completed by the prior tinker run (05:27Z). Other directives in dir are status=open (legacy) or status=completed — both filtered out by dispatcher.

backlog_trend.note: All PROP-030 thresholds clear. Open issues 37 (well under moderate=200). Net velocity strongly positive (+151 over 7d). Open-status count is 1 (most items are in assigned-analyst or other terminal-pending status). oldest_open_age_days is slightly negative due to a single issue's created_at being clock-skew slightly future of now — not a bug condition.

previous_followup.prior_finding: Decider Priority 5 silently skipped — Step 1d (PROP-037 integrity intake) and Step 1m (PROP-041 rewrite intake) both not firing across 2 consecutive decider runs.
evidence_fixed: GitHub main commit dae6fb2 at 2026-05-17T05:43:42Z by operator: 'Decider hotfix per DIRECTIVE-001 tinker diagnosis: promote Step 1d + Step 1m to Priority 2b + 2c'.
Live grep on main confirms the new blocks at lines 124 (Priority 2b — Integrity Findings Intake) and 131 (Priority 2c — Rewrite Proposal Intake) of monitor/prompts/decider.md.
Both blocks reference Step 1d / Step 1m respectively and follow the same dispatcher pattern as P1 and P2 (trigger bash + → Read reference handoff).
verification_pending: Next-decider-run keys: priority_2b_integrity_intake and priority_2c_rewrite_intake should appear in the next daily report. Next decider scheduled 2026-05-17T09:13Z.

Integrity-derived ISS promotion: report-2026-05-17T01-16.json has 7 untracked findings (1 critical, 4 major, 2 moderate). Expect open-issues.next_id to advance ~7 past 2047 after the next decider run picks them up.

Rewrite-verify intake: monitor/sloppytoppy/rewrites/RW-001.json and RW-002.json exist on main (not on FUSE — that directory doesn't exist in FUSE workspace yet). Expect priority-queue.json to gain 2 class='rewrite-verify' items after next decider run.
previous_followup.fallback_status: Not invoked. The operator's hotfix is the canonical path; the unblock-now fallback proposed in the prior run is unnecessary now.

findings.summary: Two PROP-016 Mech A stranded patches >24h old without tombstones. Operator manual action required to apply patches and tombstone the sentinel files.
findings.recommendation: Operator: apply these patches in own-clone-with-direct-push, then update tombstone_status to 'applied' on each file. The stranded ISS set includes baby-batch expansions that have likely been superseded by later EXPs — recommend reviewing whether the patches still apply cleanly before mass-application. If superseded, tombstone with status='superseded' and a brief rationale.
findings.action_taken: Flagged in this report. No self-fix — these are NEVER_PUSH-file patches that tinker cannot apply.
findings.verification_pattern: After operator action: ls monitor/decisions/stranded-patches-2026-05-1*.json should show all files with tombstone_status set to 'applied' or 'superseded'.

findings.summary: Sandbox / partition at 98% used (205M avail) with project-induced footprint 1243MB — above the 1000MB CRITICAL threshold. Next decider run requires ~290MB to clone fresh; insufficient headroom.

findings.recommendation: Operator: when finished with /tmp/edit-clone, rm -rf and re-clone as needed. The 577M clone is the dominant non-FUSE contributor. CLAUDE.md per-session clone discipline rules apply (rule #1: one working clone per repo at a time). If operator is mid-investigation, no action — just be aware decider may hit clone-disk-full on next 09:13Z run if footprint grows.

Cadence slowed from 2h to 12h on 2026-05-15 because Phase 1 exit criterion hit (assigned_analyst < 50) and BAU feed rate from decider matches 12h cadence.
